message:
fix(rewards): cross-tab sync, dev-mode coin persistence, bonus 404 handling (#6018)

Bundles fixes for three rewards-system bugs and documents a fourth:

- #6014: add a `storage` event listener in `useRewards` so a coin balance
  change in one tab is mirrored to every other open tab. Only updates when
  the incoming bucket is actually different to avoid redundant renders.
- #6012: when the session is in demo/dev mode, collapse every session onto
  a shared `demo-user` rewards bucket. Previously each auth mode produced
  a distinct `user.id`, so toggling between dev mode and OAuth login made
  the balance appear to reset. OAuth logins continue to use their real
  backend user id untouched.
- #6013: treat a 404 from `/api/rewards/bonus` as "endpoint not available
  in this environment" — set bonus points to 0 and stop polling for the
  rest of the tab's lifetime. The bonus route is a Netlify function in
  production but is not implemented by the Go backend in dev, so the
  previous behaviour logged errors on every mount.
- #6011: documented as a known limitation in the `useRewards` header
  comment. In-app coins remain localStorage-only; GitHub and bonus points
  are already server-backed so the merged total still rehydrates from the
  server sources. Full backend persistence needs a new SQLite-backed
  handler plus a sync endpoint and is deferred to a follow-up PR.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
